title: NACHLYNN 6 Pack Disposable Plastic Tablecloths 54 x 108 Inch Pink Rectangle Table Cover for Holiday Party Engagement Weddings Baptism Birthday Decoration
features: Package contents: you will receive 6 disposable plastic tablecloths, sufficient quantity, and rich colors, so you can flexibly choose to combine the perfect color for your event and party theme

Simple and convenient: our plastic rectangle tablecloth is light and convenient. Whether you are hosting a dinner party or having a picnic outdoors, our tablecloth can be taken with you without adding too much burden, and it can also meet your needs for quick cleaning

Material: our premium disposable table cloth is made of plastic material, which is easier to clean and use than most cotton and paper tablecloths. After use, just roll up the tablecloth and discard it, which greatly saves cleaning time

Size: NACHLYNN rectangle table cover size is 108 inches x 54 inches, which can be applied to rectangular tables up to 8 feet in length, which can prevent spills, stains, and scratches, and provide excellent protection for your table

Multiple uses: our party tablecloth can not only match various theme parties, but is also suitable for barbecues, high-end restaurants, weddings, birthdays, graduation parties, corporate events, holiday celebrations, and other occasions
